summary: EXP-181 complete. Three surgical patches to data/wins.json (WIN-058 append, WIN-058b replace, WIN-062 append) credit the dome author's 2026-04-17 claim_index.json registry_integrity_notes disambiguation, distinguish machine-readable fix (claim_key slugs route AI auditors via ai_manifest.json recommended_read_order) from visible-prose fix (live wins.html fetched 2026-04-18 still shows two WIN-058 badges and two WIN-062 badges, all contributing to headline 69 confirmed), and catalog as the third instance of the acknowledge-without-fix pattern alongside methodology.json timestamp_scope (Timestamp Error tab April 2026 block) and registry_counts (ISS-1087). All three patches have verified anchor text matches against current wins.json, balanced HTML tags, and were dry-run applied successfully. Counterpoint considered (ai_manifest recommends claim_index before wins.html, so API is canonical for AI auditors) and explicitly granted in each patch block before being bounded (human readers do not follow recommended_read_order; headline count is tallied against visible prose). Newsworthy flag set for decider: "Dome model ships three machine-readable concessions in 24 hours while leaving the user-facing site headline unchanged."
